message:
feat(rules): implement handle_rules_command for CLI dispatch

Connects the wa rules CLI subcommands to the PatternEngine:

- wa rules list: Iterates engine.rules(), applies optional agent-type
  filter, maps to RuleListItem, and renders via RulesListRenderer
  (supports verbose and JSON modes).

- wa rules test: Runs engine.detect() on input text, maps detections
  to RuleTestMatch (filtering out empty extracted data), and renders
  via RulesTestRenderer with match count and text length.

- wa rules show: Looks up a rule by ID, maps to RuleDetail with
  full fields (anchors, regex, workflow, remediation, manual_fix,
  learn_more_url), and renders via RuleDetailRenderer. Exits with
  error if rule ID not found.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
